title: Update DatabaseSchemaPage with PK/FK labels and full hardcoded table cards

requirements.summary: Update DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx to display 10 hardcoded database table cards with full field details, PK badges, and FK→ReferencedTable badges using pure JSX with no hooks or dynamic rendering
acceptanceCriteria: The page renders exactly 10 table cards in a responsive grid layout.
Each card displays the table name as a bold heading at the top.
Each card displays a one-line plain-English description of the table's purpose.
Each card lists all fields as rows in 'Column Name – Data Type' format.
The Primary Key field on each card is clearly labelled with a visible 'PK' badge.
All Foreign Key fields are clearly labelled with a 'FK → ReferencedTable' badge indicating the referenced table.
The component contains no .map(), no useState, no useEffect, no hooks, no routing logic, no backend calls, and no animations.
No external library imports are used beyond React and Tailwind CSS classes.
All content is hardcoded JSX — no dynamic rendering or computed values.
Styling follows the existing Medical Blue theme using Tailwind utility classes consistent with the rest of the application.
The component is a single self-contained default-export functional component with no props.

file_operations.description: Replace the entire component with hardcoded JSX that renders exactly 10 table cards (Users, Doctors, Specialties, Doctor_Schedules, Appointments, Payments, Reviews, Medical_Records, Corporate_Accounts, Subscriptions) in a responsive grid. Each card must include: (1) a bold heading with the table name, (2) a one-line plain-English description below the heading, (3) a complete list of all fields formatted as 'Column Name – Data Type' rows, (4) a 'PK' badge next to the Primary Key field (always _id ObjectId), (5) 'FK → ReferencedTable' badges next to Foreign Key fields (e.g., user_id gets 'FK → Users', doctor_id gets 'FK → Doctors', specialty_id gets 'FK → Specialties', appointment_id gets 'FK → Appointments', payment_id gets 'FK → Payments'). Use Tailwind utility classes for styling (e.g., bg-white, rounded-lg, shadow-md, p-6 for cards; text-xl font-bold for headings; text-gray-600 for descriptions; badge styling with bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs for PK; bg-purple-100 text-purple-800 for FK). Do not use any .map(), useState, useEffect, or hooks. Do not import any external libraries beyond React. Keep all content as static JSX with no computed values or dynamic rendering. Ensure the grid is responsive (e.g., grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3). Follow the Medical Blue theme color palette consistent with the rest of the application (use colors like blue-600, blue-500, etc.). Ensure the component is a single default-export functional component with no props and no routing logic.
